function.name: rpa
function.description: Perform physical mouse and keyboard actions on the computer. Allows clicking, typing, and navigating the system UI autonomously.

x.description: WARNING: DO NOT use this if you have a ui_index. X coordinate on the screen (for click actions).

y.description: WARNING: DO NOT use this if you have a ui_index. Y coordinate on the screen (for click actions).

ui_index.description: CRITICAL: The numbered UI anchor index (e.g., '15') from a recent screen_capture with annotate_ui=True. You MUST use this instead of x and y whenever possible to avoid hallucinating coordinates.

amount.description: Amount to scroll (positive for up, negative for down).

wait_after.description: Seconds to wait after the action completes before returning. Default 1.0.
